message:
🐛 Eagerly import demo-only compliance cards to prevent blank cards (#1467)

Demo-only compliance cards (ComplianceScore, PolicyViolations, FalcoAlerts,
TrivyScan, KubescapeScan) were lazy-loaded like all other cards. Since they
contain only hardcoded demo data (~255 lines total), the lazy loading added
unnecessary Suspense fallback skeletons that appeared as blank grey boxes
while heavier modules (like OPA Policies) saturated the dev server's
module transform pipeline.

Changes:
- Switch ComplianceCards from lazy() to eager import in cardRegistry
- Add missing isDemoData: true to ComplianceScore's useCardLoadingState

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
